Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Continued To Jan-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sandra Price appeared by telephone for San Francisco Jazz.

The Court noted that no one was present in court, or remotely to object to the petition. Ms. Price stated that she is not aware of any objections. The Court stated that it finds there was due diligence as to a search for interested parties, that it finds notice is sufficient and questions whether there are any creditors. Ms. Price stated that the reverse mortgage on the condominium is the only debt they are aware of, that the deed of trust is secured, that every penny that goes out the door is a penny they could use and that she would appreciate not having a bond. The Court stated that its concern is that the will is not self-proving and that they don't know of any next of kin at all. Ms. Price stated that they have been looking into the tax issue, that the Decedent's only income was his modest social security and that it didn't require filing of income taxes. The Court stated that it will grant the petition with bond set at $35,000.00. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Status on close of estate is set for December 13, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
